title: cx-task-harness MCP Server Implementation
description: Build an MCP server plugin for Claude Code that validates CX Task Specs and converts them to n8n workflows

stories.title: Project Scaffold
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject.toml exists with fastmcp, pydantic, jsonschema dependencies
src/cx_task_harness/__init__.py exists with __version__ = '0.1.0'
Directory structure created: src/cx_task_harness/{models,tools,n8n,templates/{ecommerce,travel,saas,medical}}
tests/conftest.py exists with minimal_task_spec_dict and order_cancel_task_spec_dict fixtures
uv sync --dev succeeds without errors
uv run pytest --co runs without import errors

stories.title: Common Pydantic Models
acceptanceCriteria: AgentInstruction model accepts role, conversation_flow, exit_conditions; exceptions defaults to []
BranchCondition model requires condition and next_step; variable/operator/value are optional
MemoryVariable rejects type values outside ['string','number','boolean','object','array']
TriggerFilter rejects operator values outside ['eq','neq','contains','gt','lt','in']
Trigger requires intent; keywords and filters default to []
AutomationPotential rejects score outside [0,1]
All tests in tests/test_models.py::TestAgentInstruction through TestAutomationPotential pass

stories.title: Step Types with Discriminated Union
acceptanceCriteria: 7 step classes exist: AgentStep, CodeStep, MessageStep, ActionStep, FunctionStep, BranchStep, BrowserStep
Step = Annotated[...Discriminator('type')] correctly discriminates on 'type' field
BranchStep.next_step is always None (enforced by model)
TypeAdapter(Step).validate_python({'type':'agent',...}) returns AgentStep instance
TypeAdapter(Step).validate_python({'type':'nonexistent',...}) raises ValidationError
TypeAdapter(Step).validate_json(json_string) round-trips correctly
All tests in tests/test_models.py::TestStepTypes and TestStepDiscriminatedUnion pass

stories.title: TaskSpec Top-level Model & Exports
acceptanceCriteria: TaskSpec parses minimal_task_spec_dict fixture successfully
TaskSpec parses order_cancel_task_spec_dict with 9 steps, resolving discriminated union types
TaskSpec.model_dump_json() → TaskSpec.model_validate_json() round-trips equal
TaskSpec rejects locale='fr' (only 'en' and 'ko' allowed)
SetupItem and TemplateSummary models exist in models/n8n.py
models/__init__.py re-exports all models; 'from cx_task_harness.models import TaskSpec' works
All tests in tests/test_models.py pass

stories.title: validate_task_spec Tool
acceptanceCriteria: validate_task_spec returns {valid:true} for minimal and order_cancel specs
Returns error for invalid JSON input
Returns error when next_step references non-existent step ID
Returns error when branch target references non-existent step ID
Returns error for circular references (A→B→A)
Returns error when trigger intent is empty string
Returns error for duplicate memory variable keys
Returns error when AgentStep has empty exit_conditions
Returns warning for unreachable steps (valid:true with warning)
Returns warning for FunctionStep without on_failure (valid:true with warning)
All tests in tests/test_validator.py pass

stories.title: n8n Node Template Factories
acceptanceCriteria: make_manual_trigger() returns node with type 'n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger'
make_set_node() returns node with assignments in n8n Set node format
make_code_node() with language='javascript' sets jsCode parameter
make_code_node() with language='python' sets pythonCode parameter
make_http_request_node() maps url, method, headers, body correctly
make_if_node() maps conditions to n8n IF node format
make_ai_agent_node() creates LangChain agent node with system message
All node factories return dicts with required fields: id, type, name, position, parameters, typeVersion
All tests in tests/test_n8n_nodes.py pass

stories.title: n8n Layout Algorithm
acceptanceCriteria: Linear chain A→B→C places nodes at increasing Y, same X
Branch A→[B,C] places B and C at same Y, different X
No two nodes share the same position coordinates
Empty graph does not crash
All tests in tests/test_layout.py pass

stories.title: TaskSpec → n8n Mapper
acceptanceCriteria: map_task_spec returns dict with 'nodes', 'connections', 'setup_required' keys
Minimal spec produces at least trigger + message step nodes
Order cancel spec produces HTTP Request nodes for FunctionSteps
Order cancel spec produces IF node for BranchStep
include_mock_data=True inserts [Mock] Code nodes for FunctionSteps
All connection source/target IDs reference existing node IDs
setup_required contains entries for FunctionStep nodes
All tests in tests/test_mapper.py pass

stories.title: convert_to_n8n Tool
acceptanceCriteria: convert_to_n8n returns {workflow: {...}, setup_required: [...]}
workflow.name matches TaskSpec.name
workflow.nodes all have position arrays with 2 integers
workflow.connections uses n8n format: {NodeName: {main: [[{node, type, index}]]}}
Invalid JSON input returns {error: ...}
include_mock_data=True produces more nodes than False
All tests in tests/test_converter.py pass

stories.title: n8n JSON Schema & validate_n8n Tool
acceptanceCriteria: tests/schemas/n8n_workflow.schema.json exists and is valid JSON Schema
validate_n8n returns {valid:true} for workflow produced by convert_to_n8n
validate_n8n returns {valid:false} for invalid JSON
validate_n8n returns {valid:false} for workflow missing 'nodes' field
validate_n8n returns {valid:false} for node missing 'position' field
validate_n8n always returns 'n8n_version' field
All tests in tests/test_n8n_validator.py pass

stories.title: First Template End-to-End (order_cancel)
acceptanceCriteria: src/cx_task_harness/templates/ecommerce/order_cancel.en.json exists and parses as valid TaskSpec
src/cx_task_harness/templates/ecommerce/order_cancel.ko.json exists and parses as valid TaskSpec
English template: validate → convert → validate_n8n all pass
Korean template: validate → convert → validate_n8n all pass
Snapshot test captures order_cancel.en.json conversion node summary
All tests in tests/test_converter.py::TestTemplateEndToEnd pass

stories.title: list_templates Tool
acceptanceCriteria: list_templates() returns templates with at least order_cancel entries
list_templates(industry='ecommerce') filters by industry
list_templates(locale='ko') filters by locale
Each template summary has: id, name, description, industry, locale, steps_count, step_types
get_template('ecommerce/order_cancel', 'en') returns JSON string
All returned templates validate as valid TaskSpecs
All tests in tests/test_templates.py pass

stories.title: FastMCP Server
acceptanceCriteria: server.py defines mcp = FastMCP('cx-task-harness')
mcp.call_tool('validate_task_spec', ...) returns valid JSON response
mcp.call_tool('convert_to_n8n', ...) returns workflow JSON
mcp.call_tool('validate_n8n', ...) returns validation result
mcp.call_tool('list_templates', ...) returns template list
Template resource URI template://ecommerce/order_cancel/en returns content
All tests in tests/test_server.py pass

stories.title: Remaining Templates (7 × 2 locales)
acceptanceCriteria: 14 additional template files exist (7 templates × 2 locales)
list_templates(locale='en') returns exactly 8 templates
list_templates(locale='ko') returns exactly 8 templates
All 16 template files parse as valid TaskSpec
All 16 templates pass full pipeline: validate → convert → validate_n8n
All tests in tests/test_templates.py::TestAllTemplatesPipeline pass

stories.title: Claude Code Native (CLAUDE.md & Slash Commands)
acceptanceCriteria: claude/CLAUDE.md exists with MCP tool usage rules and pipeline guide
claude/commands/analyze.md exists with support data analysis prompt
claude/commands/design.md exists with TaskSpec generation prompt
claude/commands/guide.md exists with n8n setup guide prompt
All four files are non-empty markdown with clear structure

stories.title: README, Docs & Sample Fixture
acceptanceCriteria: README.md exists with Quick Start, MCP Tools table, Templates list, Development section
docs/TASK_SPEC.md exists with schema reference table
tests/fixtures/sample_support_logs.csv exists with at least 10 rows
uv run pytest -v shows ALL tests passing
No import errors or warnings in test collection
